query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: An empty urban street at night flanked by industrial buildings under yellow-orange streetlights. A curved lamp post on the sidewalk illuminates the asphalt near a pedestrian crossing sign and a speed-limit sign displaying 20. To the right, a sloped concrete ramp with a metal railing ascends to a dark doorway on a building featuring narrow vertical windows and glass-block windows. Posters and graffiti cover a distant wall, while utility poles and additional streetlights line the left side of the road, casting long shadows across the pavement.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An empty urban street at night flanked by industrial buildings under a sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor cast that shifts the asphalt, walls, and concrete toward an unsettling hue. A curved lamp post on the sidewalk illuminates the asphalt near a pedestrian crossing sign and a speed-limit sign displaying 20, its bright glow pooling on the pavement. To the right, a sloped concrete ramp with a metal railing ascends to a dark doorway on a building featuring narrow vertical windows and glass-block windows. The pervasive unnatural tint gives the deserted industrial scene a contaminated, oppressive atmosphere.
